title: calophyllum caudatum
intro: Calophyllum caudatum, also known as the 'Malaysian merbau' or 'Gajah putih', is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the family Clusiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calophyllum caudatum include its ability to accelerate wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which are used topically to apply the medicinal properties directly to affected areas.
